## Checklist

- [ ] All commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) for DCO compliance
- [ ] Ruff passes: `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] Mypy passes: `uv run mypy src/`
- [ ] All tests pass: `uv run pytest tests/`
- [ ] New public API covered by tests
- [ ] Docstrings updated if public interface changed
- [ ] Branch is rebased on latest `main`

<!-- Anything unusual — breaking SDK changes, new abstract methods, behaviour changes that affect existing adapters? -->
